articles.title: CENTCOM says Strait of Hormuz remains open despite Iranian claims
articles.summary: CENTCOM says Strait of Hormuz remains open despite Iranian claims US Central Command says the Strait of Hormuz remains open to commercial shipping and that “safe pathways have been established for commercial vessels” travelling through the strategic waterway. “The pathways are available to all vessels not violating the blockade against Iran. Hundreds of ships have transited the waterway in the past two months,” CENTCOM said in a social media post. articles.title: Taking Kharg Island 'Very Doable' For US Forces in MidEast, Says Rebecca Grant
articles.summary: Rebecca Grant, senior fellow and vice president for defense programs at the Lexington Institute, said that the US is better positioned to take over Kharg Island than it was at the start of the war and that it is 'very doable' for the forces central command has in the region. Grant said that because the US has air dominance in the region and controls all of the ways of approach, there would not need to be a big American troop presence on the island itself. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: Hamas co-founder Hassan Yousef released from Israeli detention
articles.summary: Hamas co-founder Hassan Yousef released from Israeli detention Hassan Yousef, a co-founder and senior leader of Hamas in the occupied West Bank, has been released from Israeli custody, AFP reported, citing his son. Yousef, 71, had been held without trial since October 2023 under administrative detention. A prominent Hamas figure in the West Bank, Yousef helped establish the movement in the 1980s alongside Ahmad Yassine and other Palestinian members of the Muslim Brotherhood. Israeli strikes kill at least six people in Lebanon’s Tyre district
articles.summary: Israeli strikes kill at least six people in Lebanon’s Tyre district Several Israeli attacks in Lebanon’s Tyre district have killed at least six people, according to the state-run National News Agency. One strike in the town of al-Aabbassiyah killed four people, while another attack in Deir Qanoun an-Naher left two people dead. The agency also reported an Israeli strike targeting a motorcycle near the village of Wadi Jilou. Additional Israeli raids were reported in the towns of al-Majadel and Majdal Zoun.
